# 平米內參 - 預售屋數據儀表板 (sqmtalk.com)

## Detailed Overview
平米內參 (sqmtalk.com) is a professional-grade analytics platform designed specifically for the Taiwanese real estate market. It focuses on the pre-sale housing (預售屋) sector, providing transparency through advanced data visualization and comparative analysis.

## Key Modules & Data Points

### 1. Price Strategy (定價策略)
Analyzes the pricing distribution of housing projects. It helps users identify the "Sweet Spot" where price meets market demand, ensuring products are positioned correctly against PR (Percentile Rank) benchmarks.

### 2. Floor Premium & Heatmap (垂直價差熱力圖)
A unique feature that displays a project's inventory in a grid format, color-coded by price or sales status. This allows for an instant "Floor Premium" analysis, showing how different floors and orientations are valued relative to each other.

### 3. Market Velocity (去化速度)
Tracks how quickly units are being sold (Velocity) compared to nearby competing projects. This data is crucial for adjusting sales rhythms and marketing strategies dynamically.

### 4. Competitor Analysis (競品排行)
Provides a macro view of the market share and performance rankings of different developers and specific projects within a selected region.

## Data Sources
The platform primary source is the Taiwan government's **Real Estate Price Registration (實價登錄)** database, which is processed and enhanced with proprietary algorithms for higher accuracy and better visualization.

## Contact & Links
- **Website**: [https://www.sqmtalk.com/](https://www.sqmtalk.com/)
- **Social**: LINE One-Click Login supported for member access.
